name: iPhone Premium MagSafe Clear Case
description: Crystal clear protective case with integrated high-grade magnets for seamless MagSafe charging and accessory compatibility.
warning: Peel off the interior and exterior protective films before snapping onto your phone.

name: iPhone Liquid Silicone Case with Soft Microfiber Lining
description: Silky, soft-touch liquid silicone exterior paired with an inner microfiber cloth lining to protect your iPhone from abrasions and lint.
warning: Silicone material can attract pocket lint initially but wipes clean instantly with a damp cloth.

name: iPhone Magnetic Bubble Suction Silicone Case
description: A trendy, functional hybrid liquid silicone case featuring an integrated array of mini suction cups on the back, allowing you to temporarily mount your phone to smooth surfaces for hands-free content creation or viewing.

specs.material: Premium Liquid Silicone & Rubber Suction Array

warning: Ensure the suction cups and target surface are clean and smooth before mounting. Do not leave unattended for extended periods.

name: iPhone Glitter Rhinestone MagSafe Luxury Case
description: An elegant, eye-catching clear case featuring a luxury glitter-infused MagSafe ring and a sparkling rhinestone-embellished camera lens protective border.
warning: Handle with care to protect the embedded rhinestones from abrasive rubbing against rough surfaces.

name: Tribal Patterned Fashion Clear Bumper Case
description: Stylish clear protection featuring unique printed graphics like bows, leopard prints, and butterfly patterns, combined with a contrasting frosted white camera shield frame.

specs.compatibility: Samsung Galaxy A Series, Tecno Camon, Infinix Note, Spark Series

warning: Ensure your specific Android model sub-variant (e.g., Spark Slim, Camon 40 Pro) matches for correct camera alignment.

name: Android Crystal Clear MagSafe Bumper Case
description: Brings the power of MagSafe ecosystems to flat and folding Android devices. Features an embedded magnetic ring on a crystal clear, hard-shell back tailored for modern flagships.

specs.material: Hard Acrylic Back & Flexible TPU Border
specs.compatibility: Samsung S23/S24 Ultra, Galaxy Fold/Flip Series, Premium Pixel and OnePlus Models

warning: Only enables magnetic accessory retention; wireless charging functions require the device itself to support Qi charging.

name: Android Geometric Texture Designer Case
description: A premium designer case featuring unique back panel textures ranging from carbon fiber weaves, houndstooth fabrics, and pixelated reflective mesh dots with subtle holographic finishes.
features: Houndstooth, Carbon Fiber, and Pixel Art Finishes

specs.material: Tough PC Shell & Composite Texture Overlay
specs.compatibility: Samsung A-Series, Infinix Hot, Tecno Spark, Redmi Series

warning: Clean the textured back surface gently with a dry microfiber cloth to preserve the finish integrity.

name: Android Ultra-Slim Matte Translucent Case
description: A gorgeous frosted translucent matte hard back case that keeps fingerprints away while preserving your phone's native branding silhouette.

specs.compatibility: Universal compatibility cross cuts for major Android vendors in Nairobi
specs.safety: Basic Scratch Shield & Minor Drop Cushioning

warning: This focuses strictly on slim aesthetics and offers less protection against high-altitude drops.
